name: clifford-number
description: The Clifford Number: evidenced institutional adjacency across UK AI policy, founder networks, procurement pathways, and public-sector operating layers.

scripts.test: node test/graph.test.js && node test/mcp-server.test.js && node test/update-sweep.test.js && node test/research-tools.test.js && node test/import-review.test.js && node test/add-edge.test.js && python3 test/research_extractor_test.py
scripts.check: npm run validate && npm run validate:cases && npm test
scripts.validate:cases: node src/validate.js cases/uk-ai-policy.json && node src/validate.js cases/template.json
scripts.check:research: node --check tools/research/lda-pull.mjs && node --check tools/research/sec-formd.mjs && node --check tools/research/usaspending-bulk-request.mjs && bash -n tools/research/download-irs-teos.sh && python3 -m py_compile tools/research/extract-schedule-i.py
